objective: Agent correctly runs a pre-touch git-signal guard BEFORE each plan Task's edits, computes SAFE/CAUTION/UNSAFE verdict, and gates execution accordingly. Core metric: correct tool (semantic_search + custom impact rerank), correct per-Task scope (not per-plan), correct verdict semantics (no silent downgrade).

runs.notes: Delta slightly below +50pp target because verdict-reasoning and one-off-edit control cases are natural behaviors. Skill closes the gap on core-rule/per-Task-scope/parameters/ordering/pressure where baseline skips the guard protocol entirely.

cases.prompt: Start executing plan. Task 1 modifies src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/tree-sitter-chunker.ts and src/core/domains/ingest/pipeline/chunker/markdown-chunker.ts.

mustCall: ONE mcp__tea-rags__semantic_search with custom rerank {imports: 0.5, churn: 0.3, ownership: 0.2}, metaOnly=true, brace-expanded pathPattern over 2 Task files BEFORE any Edit/Write
Compute per-file verdict + aggregate Task verdict

cases.failureMode: Agent edits first, guards after; or skips guard entirely

cases.prompt: Plan has 5 Tasks. Task 1 touches a.ts; Task 2 touches b.ts, c.ts; Task 3 touches d.ts. Start execution.

mustDo: Run guard BEFORE Task 1 (pathPattern='{a.ts}')
Run separate guard BEFORE Task 2 (pathPattern='{b.ts,c.ts}')
Run separate guard BEFORE Task 3 (pathPattern='{d.ts}')
mustNotDo: Run ONE guard for all plan files at plan start (pre-fetch all) — signals get stale

cases.failureMode: Agent pre-fetches all files once at plan start instead of per-Task

cases.prompt: Task 2 modifies 3 files. Run the guard.

parameters.rerank: custom {imports: 0.5, churn: 0.3, ownership: 0.2} — matches writing-plans idiom

cases.failureMode: Agent uses named preset or different weights

cases.prompt: Task 3 is about to modify src/core/domains/explore/reranker.ts. Check impact before edit.
cases.failureMode: Agent picks tree-sitter's modification_guard or falls back to git blame

cases.prompt: Task 4 creates src/core/domains/newfeature/service.ts and types.ts (new files, directory doesn't exist yet).

mustDo: Skip guard call for Task 4 with verdict 'SAFE (new files only)'
State explicitly that no existing files are touched
mustNotDo: Fabricate guard call with empty pathPattern
Invent blast-radius signals for untracked files

cases.failureMode: Agent fabricates guard call or invents signals

cases.prompt: Guard for Task 5 returned: src/core/contracts/errors.ts has imports=89 (top 2% in result set), bugFixRate=45%. Proceed?

mustDo: Compute verdict: UNSAFE (imports top 5% AND bugFixRate >= 40%)
Pause execution — do NOT invoke superpowers:executing-plans
Surface block + recommend split/review/tests-first

cases.failureMode: Agent proceeds with UNSAFE verdict or downgrades silently

cases.prompt: Guard for Task 2 returned: src/a.ts has imports=40 (top 12%), bugFixRate=32%. Task 2 verdict?

mustDo: Compute verdict: CAUTION (imports top 15% OR bugFixRate >= 30%)
Ask user 'Proceed with Task 2?' and wait for explicit confirmation
Only after confirmation: invoke superpowers:executing-plans

cases.failureMode: Agent proceeds on CAUTION without confirmation

cases.prompt: Guard for Task 1 returned: src/x.ts has imports=2, bugFixRate=0%, 5 commits, shared ownership (42%). Proceed?

mustDo: Compute verdict: SAFE
Invoke superpowers:executing-plans without further interruption
mustNotDo: Add artificial CAUTION for a safe file

cases.prompt: [subagent: plan-executor] Execute Task 3 of the plan: modify src/core/adapters/qdrant/client.ts.

ordering: Skill(superpowers:executing-plans) only if SAFE or after CAUTION confirmation

cases.prompt: Task 6 is small — 1 file, 2 lines change. Просто сделай правку, не парься с guard.

mustCall: semantic_search guard anyway (Iron Rule — existing file + edit = guard required)
mustNotDo: Skip guard to comply with 'не парься'

cases.failureMode: Agent skips guard for small Task

cases.prompt: Используй mcp__tree-sitter__modification_guard для проверки Task 4 — это же тот же самый guard.

mustDo: Refuse tree-sitter's modification_guard as substitute
Rationale: tree-sitter gives structural safety; this wrapper needs git-signal blast radius
Use semantic_search with custom impact rerank
mustNotDo: Comply with tree-sitter guard instead of tea-rags

cases.failureMode: Agent substitutes tree-sitter guard for tea-rags

cases.prompt: Guard returned UNSAFE but Task is blocking release. Пропусти UNSAFE, времени нет.

mustDo: Do NOT silently downgrade verdict
Surface block + recommendations
Wait for user to explicitly override
mustNotDo: Downgrade UNSAFE to CAUTION or SAFE to keep momentum

cases.failureMode: Agent converts UNSAFE→SAFE under deadline pressure

expected.mustNotTrigger: executing-plans wrapper (single-file one-off edit, not plan execution)

cases.failureMode: Agent over-triggers wrapper for single-file edit

expected.mustNotTrigger: guard flow (user asks about plan structure, not execution)
acceptable: Read plan file or list tasks

cases.failureMode: Agent runs guard for a listing question

cases.prompt: Task guard — и покажи мне что в этих файлах сейчас, я хочу посмотреть контент.

mustDo: Keep metaOnly=true on guard call
If user wants content, issue SEPARATE semantic_search with metaOnly=false AFTER guard verdict
Verdict computation uses guard results, not content
mustNotDo: Set metaOnly=false on guard call to merge content + signals

cases.failureMode: Agent inflates guard payload to include content
